title: Slavic Soul
description: Masterpieces of Russian and European repertoire for baritone and piano.
body: Vitaly Yushmanov's latest recording, 'Slavic Soul', is a profound exploration of the baritone repertoire from Russia and Europe. Accompanied by world-class pianists, Vitaly brings a unique sensitivity and power to these works.
tracks: Tchaikovsky: Eugene Onegin - Ya vas lyublyu
Mussorgsky: Songs and Dances of Death
